It has an inner compartment and three card slots. The small card case can be detached and used alone in other bags or hung anywhere. The adjustable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody carrying. A perfect combination of practicality and style. Size: 17x9.6x3.5cm

A detachable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody wear to show off a modern look. Size: 21 * 14 * 8 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original Replicas Exclusive Real Photos📷【Coussin Hobo MM Handbag】m12071 Taupe m12068 Black m12072 Magenta (Embossed)
items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original Replicas Exclusive Real Photos📷【Coussin Hobo MM Handbag】m12071 Taupe m12068 Black m12072 Magenta (Embossed)
As a statement addition to the Coussin series, this new Hobo model strikes a balance between fashion and function. Featuring the series' iconic design details, it is made of smooth padded leather embossed with the house's monogram and features a signature thick chain accented with gold hardware. A large removable textile strap offers multiple wearing options. This versatile product also includes a removable zip pouch large enough to hold a laptop.
Size: 38 x 33 x 10 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original Replicas Exclusive Real Photos📷Upgraded Version!【Nova MM Handbag】M13137 Black Leather
items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original Replicas Exclusive Real Photos📷Upgraded Version!【Nova MM Handbag】M13137 Black Leather
Introducing the new Nova MM, a stylish and refined handbag that made its debut on the Cruise 2025 runway. The Nova is crafted from noble calfskin with a subtle glazed finish, conveying bold yet relaxed elegance. Rich signature details, including the LV monogram and Monogram canvas decoration. Use the sliding gold chain to find the perfect drop when styling.
Size: 36 x 10 x 37 cm

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original Reproduction Exclusive Real Photos 📷【Chess Messenger Bag】N40561 Red (Check)
Inspired by the iconic Damier check of the House, Creative Director Pharrell Williams created this unique shape for the new Damier Pop coated canvas. The bag combines other House design clues, including natural leather trim, reinforced corners, and a top handle. The detachable strap can be adjusted for crossbody carrying.
Size: 24 x 24 x 8 cm

items.name_cn:

Crafted from Monogram coated canvas, featuring contrasting leather trim to highlight the crescent shape. The lightweight design combines an adjustable handle and a detachable chain, allowing for effortless conversion between shoulder and crossbody styles. Dimensions: 19 x 5 x 28.5 cm
